title: Diploma Jobs 2026 – Apprentice Trainees
shortInfo: National Institute of Ocean Technology (NIOT) recruits 30 Apprentice Trainees Posts. Candidates with Diploma , B.Tech/B.E can attend for walk in on 10 June 2026.

basic_details.job_title: NIOT Apprentice Trainees Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 30 Posts
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Ocean Technology (NIOT) recruits 30 Apprentice Trainees Posts. Candidates with Diploma , B.Tech/B.E can attend for walk in on 10 June 2026.

application_fee.details: Technician Apprentice: Minimum 18 years, Maximum 24 years. Graduate Apprentice: Minimum 21 years, Maximum 26 years. Age Relaxation: SC/ST: 5 years, OBC: 3 years, PwBD: 10 years, PwBD (SC/ST): 15 years, PwBD (OBC): 13 years.

age_limit.maximum_age: Technician/Diploma: Min 18, Max 24 years. Graduate/Degree: Min 21, Max 26 years.
age_limit.age_details: Technician/Diploma: Min 18, Max 24 years. Graduate/Degree: Min 21, Max 26 years.
age_limit.details: Technician Apprentice: Minimum 18 years, Maximum 24 years. Graduate Apprentice: Minimum 21 years, Maximum 26 years. Age Relaxation: SC/ST: 5 years, OBC: 3 years, PwBD: 10 years, PwBD (SC/ST): 15 years, PwBD (OBC): 13 years.

qualification.education_qualification: Diploma in Engineering/Technology or Graduate Degree in Engineering/Technology/relevant discipline.
qualification.details: Technician Apprentice: Diploma in Engineering/Technology in full time granted by a State Council or Board of Technical education established by a State Government/University/Institutions in relevant discipline. Graduate Apprentice: Full time graduate degree granted by a recognized University/Institutions in relevant discipline. All: Engineering/Diploma/Non-Engineering Graduates who have passed out their Degree/Diploma from the AICTE/DOTE/UGC approved institutions respectively, within 05 years after qualifying their examinations are eligible.

salary_details.salary: Rs.12000/- for Technician, Rs.13000/- for Graduate

faq.question: What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for NIOT Apprentice Trainees?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for NIOT Apprentice Trainees is scheduled for 10th June 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue by the reporting time.

faq.question: What are the minimum and maximum age limits for Technician Apprentice posts?
faq.answer: For Technician Apprentice posts, the minimum age is 18 years and the maximum age is 24 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: What is the stipend offered for Graduate Apprentice trainees?
faq.answer: Graduate Apprentice trainees will receive a stipend of Rs. 13,000/- per month. A portion of this stipend is supported by the Government under the DBT Scheme.

faq.question: What is the educational qualification required for Graduate Apprentice posts?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a full-time graduate degree in Engineering/Technology or a relevant discipline from a recognized university to be eligible for Graduate Apprentice positions.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available for NIOT Apprentice Trainees?
faq.answer: There are a total of 30 vacancies announced for the Apprentice Trainees positions at the National Institute of Ocean Technology.

faq.question: What is the selection process for NIOT Apprentice Trainees?
faq.answer: The selection process for NIOT Apprentice Trainees will be based on a walk-in interview. Candidates need to perform well in the interview to be selected.

faq.question: Where is the walk-in interview for NIOT Apprentice Trainees being held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the National Institute of Ocean Technology (NIOT) in Chennai, Tamil Nadu. The exact address will be in the official notification.

faq.question: Do I need to register online before attending the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates are advised to register online on the NATS portal (https://nats.education.gov.in/) before appearing for the walk-in interview.

faq.question: What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry original and self-attested photocopies of relevant certificates, mark sheets, proof of date of birth, Aadhaar Card, and passport size photograph.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for NIOT Apprentice Trainees recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for the NIOT Apprentice Trainees recruitment. Candidates can attend the walk-in interview without paying any fee.

seo_tags: National Institute of Ocean Technology Technician Apprentice (Mechanical Engineering)
